mainText: Today's top stories: OpenAI's Jalapeño chip was created by an algorithm, Google keeps losing top AI researchers to rivals, Meta employees warn AI moderation rollout is too, Authors Guild test finds some AI detectors perfectly, Five things you need to know, Learning to lead in a hybrid human-AI enterprise, Google DeepMind is worried about what happens when, XAI fired engineer who raised alarms about Grok, Amazon borrows $17.5B from banks as AI spending, Google just redesigned the search box
